serena_lsp_status: OPERATIONAL since 2026-05-07. 23 tools stable for 10 runs. find_symbol --name_path_pattern (NOT --name_path); receiver methods need '(*Type).method' qualified form; find_referencing_symbols --relative_path is a file. JSON stdin pipe with '.' sentinel. Focused find_referencing_symbols ~2.3s; broad find_symbol 70s+ (prefer Grep). activate_project ~7s cold.

established_patterns.options_struct_model: CompileConfig in pkg/cli/compile_pipeline.go is the refactor model
established_patterns.pkg_constants_grouping: pkg/constants/constants.go is canonical for Default* constants. FilePerm/DirPerm/DefaultHTTPClientTimeout all landed here.
established_patterns.helper_underadoption_failure_mode: Persistent thread across Runs 5/7/8/9/10/11/12/13: helper exists but call sites bypass via literal duplication OR different-shape construction OR linter is informational-only. Re-audit cadence ~7 days catches most adoption rollouts.
established_patterns.context_propagation_pattern: Correct at actionpins.go:317: cmp.Or(ctx.Ctx, context.Background()). context.Background() ONLY at top-level boundaries.
established_patterns.non_context_convenience_wrapper: github_cli.go RunGH/RunGHContext: short-name wrapper creates Background and calls Context variant. Defensible.
established_patterns.init_function_criteria: Acceptable: analyzer flag registration, wasm build-tag overrides, embedded JSON load, map derivation from package-level data. NOT acceptable: log-only stub bodies whose comments admit work was removed.
established_patterns.mutex_unlock_idiom: defer mu.Unlock() is dominant (~85% post-Run-12 fix). Manual Unlock fragile to future early-return additions UNLESS the manual pattern is intentional release-before-slow-call (spinner.Quit + Wait, debounce timer parallel compile) — those are defensible and were accepted in #32953 closure.
established_patterns.cache_state_struct_consolidation: Run 12-13: syncutil.OnceLoader[T] is the generic helper. Adopted in pkg/cli/repo.go:16 + pkg/workflow/repository_features_validation.go:67. Model for future cross-package singleflight cache consolidation.
established_patterns.errstringmatch_anti_pattern: Anti-pattern: strings.Contains(err.Error(), "literal"). Linter in pkg/linters/errstringmatch exists. Preferred replacements: errors.Is/errors.As for owned errors, errorutil.IsNotFoundError-shape helpers for HTTP-status text classification, sentinel errors at boundaries, //nolint:errstringmatch for gh-CLI-text matches with no clean alternative.
established_patterns.errorutil_helper_shape: errorutil.IsNotFoundError is the model: returns false for nil, ToLower(err.Error()), Contains-OR of numeric status AND english phrase. Sibling helpers for 403/410/etc. should follow exactly this shape.

bash_policy_limits: Workspace shell blocks multi-statement scripts and awk on /dev/null. mkdir/ls outside /home/runner/work/gh-aw/gh-aw blocked. gh CLI returns 403 on /meta - no duplicate detection via /api/v3/meta. Use Write tool over heredoc append. Compound 'mkdir && ls' is split-checked - issue separate calls. Run 13: `go build` IS BLOCKED by sandbox even with dangerouslyDisableSandbox=true; static analysis via Grep+Read only. Output redirection (>>) to /tmp/gh-aw/repo-memory blocked; use Write tool to overwrite file.
